creator: sa.inbox@gmail.com
text:
Incorrect link in site menu "Support-Bug Reports" from ports search results page.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Click on the link http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=any+search&stype=all
2. In the top menu select Support- Bug Reports
3. result will be 404:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/search/
Not Found
The requested URL /bugzilla/search/ was not found on this server.

It is required to correct mentioned menu link to /search/ (instead of /bugzilla/search/)
